hooks.command: echo 'SESSION END:' && echo '1. Confirm stubs/<file> and its root-level mirror match for any template files touched' && echo '2. If AGENTS.md, .claude/rules/security.md, or .claude/rules/testing.md changed, update .github/copilot-instructions.md (stubs/ and root) to match' && echo '3. Flag any inconsistencies found across template files'
